claim_text: Half of the N top-dressed just after irrigation at crown-root initiation gave higher yields than N applied before irrigation (which enhances leaching loss).

value.raw_value_text: Nitrogen 100 kglha and half of nitrogen when top-dressed just after irrigation recorded greater grain and straw yields. ... Nitrogen top dressed after irrigation (at CRI stage) showed better result than top dressed before irrigation.
value.text_value: Half of the N top-dressed just after irrigation at crown-root initiation gave higher yields than N applied before irrigation (which enhances leaching loss).

provenance.evidence_text: Nitrogen 100 kglha and half of nitrogen when top-dressed just after irrigation recorded greater grain and straw yields. ... Nitrogen top dressed after irrigation (at CRI stage) showed better result than top dressed before irrigation.
